data.name: YOUR ADULT STORE
data.detailed_description:
🔞Welcome to the adult business world!

Build your 18+ store, manage the range and become the king of the pleasure industry.
Choose a profitable assortment, hire staff, and learn the tastes of your audience.

In game you will find:

📊Full store management: from product selection to price tags

💘Product categories: from romance to outright hits

😏Unpredictable customers: with different personalities and desires

Stylish, sexy and spicy atmosphere with humor awaits you in the game.

In this business, every detail counts... especially if it has a vibe.

data.short_description: Open an adult store, manage your assortment, grow your business and discover increasingly explicit content in a stylish 18+ industry simulator.

英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 615 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 615 MB 可用空間
